Taskade AI agents support 11+ LLMs including OpenAI GPT series, Anthropic Claude, and Google Gemini
AI agents market size is projected to reach $7.63 billion by 2026 and $50.31 billion by 2030

Taskade connects with 100+ native integrations and 7,000+ apps via Zapier
Taskade Free plan includes 1,000 monthly AI credits; Plus plan at $16/month includes 2,000 AI generations
